# busbar_info (Data Source)

Read-only view of the target busbar gateway: version, the compiled-in plugin proof, uptime, and topology counts (GET /api/v1/admin/info).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read the target gateway's version, compiled-in plugin proof, and topology.
data "busbar_info" "current" {}

output "busbar_version" {
  value = data.busbar_info.current.version
}

output "compiled_auth_modules" {
  value = data.busbar_info.current.auth_modules
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `auth_modules` (List of String) Auth modules compiled into this binary (the compliance-by-compilation proof).
- `config_persistence` (Boolean) Whether API-applied config changes are durable across restarts (BUSBAR_CONFIG_OVERLAY set) versus live-only.
- `config_version` (Number) Monotonic config version — 0 at boot, +1 per API config apply. Process-local; resets on restart.
- `hook_plugins` (List of String) Hook plugins compiled into this binary.
- `models` (Number) Number of configured model lanes.
- `pools` (Number) Number of configured pools.
- `providers` (Number) Number of configured providers.
- `started_at` (Number) Epoch seconds of process start — the boot-epoch marker. A changed value means a restart (config_version resets), never a config revert.
- `uptime_seconds` (Number) Seconds since the gateway process started; null if never stamped.
- `version` (String) busbar semantic version reported by the gateway.
- `weighted_floor` (Boolean) The inline SWRR floor — always true (compiled in unconditionally).
